sendCycle.title: Send Cycle
sendCycle.description: Number of measurement cycles per transmission.

ledOn.description: Whether the LED indicator is enabled.

adrOn.title: ADR On
adrOn.description: Whether Adaptive Data Rate is enabled.

contVocMeas.description: Whether continuous VOC measurement is enabled.

reportInterval.title: Report Interval Flag
reportInterval.description: Whether a custom report interval is active.

co2Subsamples.title: CO2 Subsamples
co2Subsamples.description: Number of CO2 subsamples per measurement.

abcPeriod.title: ABC Calibration Period
abcPeriod.description: Automatic Baseline Calibration period in hours.

alarmTime.description: Door alarm trigger time in seconds.

hallDebounce.title: Hall Sensor Debounce
hallDebounce.description: Hall sensor debounce time in milliseconds.

doorStatusTime.description: Door status reporting interval in seconds.

noiseHoldIntervalMin.title: Noise Hold Interval
noiseHoldIntervalMin.description: Noise alarm hold interval in minutes.

noiseAbsThreshold.title: Noise Absolute Threshold
noiseAbsThreshold.description: Absolute noise threshold for alarm trigger.

pmIntegrationTimeS.title: PM Integration Time
pmIntegrationTimeS.description: Particulate matter sensor integration time in seconds.
